About RigAI

Offroad upgrade planning for beginners

RigAI helps SUV owners understand what to buy first, what to skip for now, and what to search for when researching parts.

Who It Is For

RigAI is made for drivers who are new to offroad upgrades and want a clear, step-by-step vehicle upgrade plan before spending money.

How It Helps

The app turns vehicle use, budget, country, and experience level into plain recommendations. It explains why an upgrade helps and reminds users to verify fitment before buying.

Affiliate Search

RigAI may provide Amazon search ideas. Amazon is the only supported affiliate destination for now.

As an Amazon Associate, RigAI earns from qualifying purchases.
